mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN equipment_status = 'OPERATING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS operatingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN equipment_status = 'STOPPED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS stoppedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN equipment_status = 'UNDER_INSPECTION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS underInspectionCount, SUM(CASE WHEN equipment_status = 'DISPOSED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS disposedCount FROM equipment WHERE is_deleted = false

SELECT e.equipment_id AS equipmentId, e.equipment_process_id AS equipmentProcessId, e.environment_standard_id AS environmentStandardId, e.equipment_code AS equipmentCode, e.equipment_name AS equipmentName, e.equipment_status AS equipmentStatus, e.equipment_grade AS equipmentGrade, COALESCE( ( SELECT eb.current_equipment_grade FROM equipment_baseline eb WHERE eb.equipment_id = e.equipment_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN eb.equipment_baseline_calculated_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, eb.equipment_baseline_calculated_at DESC, eb.equipment_baseline_id DESC LIMIT 1 ), e.equipment_grade ) AS currentEquipmentGrade, e.equipment_install_date AS equipmentInstallDate, e.equipment_description AS equipmentDescription, CASE WHEN ep.equipment_process_id IS NULL OR ep.is_deleted = true THEN '삭제된 공정' ELSE ep.equipment_process_name END AS equipmentProcessName, CASE WHEN fl.factory_line_id IS NULL OR fl.is_deleted = true THEN '삭제된 라인' ELSE fl.factory_line_name END AS factoryLineName, es.environment_code AS environmentCode, CASE WHEN es.environment_standard_id IS NULL OR es.is_deleted = true THEN '삭제된 환경 기준' ELSE es.environment_name END AS environmentName FROM equipment e LEFT JOIN equipment_process ep ON e.equipment_process_id = ep.equipment_process_id LEFT JOIN factory_line fl ON ep.factory_line_id = fl.factory_line_id LEFT JOIN environment_standard es ON e.environment_standard_id = es.environment_standard_id WHERE e.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND e.is_deleted = false
SELECT equipment_id FROM equipment WHERE equipment_code = #{equipmentCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT equipment_aging_param_id FROM equipment_aging_param WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} LIMIT 1
SELECT equipment_baseline_id FROM equipment_baseline WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} LIMIT 1

SELECT equipment_aging_param_id AS equipmentAgingParamId, equipment_id AS equipmentId, equipment_eta_age AS equipmentEtaAge, equipment_warranty_month AS equipmentWarrantyMonth, equipment_design_life_months AS equipmentDesignLifeMonths, equipment_wear_coefficient AS equipmentWearCoefficient, equipment_age_months AS equipmentAgeMonths, equipment_age_calculated_at AS equipmentAgeCalculatedAt FROM equipment_aging_param WHERE equipment_aging_param_id = #{equipmentAgingParamId}

SELECT equipment_aging_param_id AS equipmentAgingParamId, equipment_id AS equipmentId, equipment_eta_age AS equipmentEtaAge, equipment_warranty_month AS equipmentWarrantyMonth, equipment_design_life_months AS equipmentDesignLifeMonths, equipment_wear_coefficient AS equipmentWearCoefficient, equipment_age_months AS equipmentAgeMonths, equipment_age_calculated_at AS equipmentAgeCalculatedAt FROM equipment_aging_param WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN equipment_age_calculated_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, equipment_age_calculated_at DESC, equipment_aging_param_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT equipment_aging_param_id AS equipmentAgingParamId, equipment_id AS equipmentId, equipment_eta_age AS equipmentEtaAge, equipment_warranty_month AS equipmentWarrantyMonth, equipment_design_life_months AS equipmentDesignLifeMonths, equipment_wear_coefficient AS equipmentWearCoefficient, equipment_age_months AS equipmentAgeMonths, equipment_age_calculated_at AS equipmentAgeCalculatedAt FROM equipment_aging_param WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND equipment_age_calculated_at <= #{referenceTime} ORDER BY equipment_age_calculated_at DESC, equipment_aging_param_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT equipment_aging_param_id AS equipmentAgingParamId, equipment_id AS equipmentId, equipment_eta_age AS equipmentEtaAge, equipment_warranty_month AS equipmentWarrantyMonth, equipment_design_life_months AS equipmentDesignLifeMonths, equipment_wear_coefficient AS equipmentWearCoefficient, equipment_age_months AS equipmentAgeMonths, equipment_age_calculated_at AS equipmentAgeCalculatedAt FROM equipment_aging_param WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND equipment_age_calculated_at >= #{referenceTime} ORDER BY equipment_age_calculated_at ASC, equipment_aging_param_id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT equipment_aging_param_id AS equipmentAgingParamId, equipment_id AS equipmentId, equipment_eta_age AS equipmentEtaAge, equipment_warranty_month AS equipmentWarrantyMonth, equipment_design_life_months AS equipmentDesignLifeMonths, equipment_wear_coefficient AS equipmentWearCoefficient, equipment_age_months AS equipmentAgeMonths, equipment_age_calculated_at AS equipmentAgeCalculatedAt FROM equipment_aging_param WHERE equipment_age_calculated_at IS NULL OR equipment_eta_age IS NULL OR equipment_age_months IS NULL ORDER BY equipment_aging_param_id DESC

SELECT equipment_baseline_id AS equipmentBaselineId, equipment_id AS equipmentId, equipment_aging_param_id AS equipmentAgingParamId, equipment_standard_performance_rate AS equipmentStandardPerformanceRate, equipment_baseline_error_rate AS equipmentBaselineErrorRate, equipment_eta_maint AS equipmentEtaMaint, equipment_idx AS equipmentIdx, current_equipment_grade AS currentEquipmentGrade, equipment_baseline_calculated_at AS equipmentBaselineCalculatedAt FROM equipment_baseline WHERE equipment_baseline_id = #{equipmentBaselineId}

SELECT equipment_baseline_id AS equipmentBaselineId, equipment_id AS equipmentId, equipment_aging_param_id AS equipmentAgingParamId, equipment_standard_performance_rate AS equipmentStandardPerformanceRate, equipment_baseline_error_rate AS equipmentBaselineErrorRate, equipment_eta_maint AS equipmentEtaMaint, equipment_idx AS equipmentIdx, current_equipment_grade AS currentEquipmentGrade, equipment_baseline_calculated_at AS equipmentBaselineCalculatedAt FROM equipment_baseline WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN equipment_baseline_calculated_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, equipment_baseline_calculated_at DESC, equipment_baseline_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT equipment_baseline_id AS equipmentBaselineId, equipment_id AS equipmentId, equipment_aging_param_id AS equipmentAgingParamId, equipment_standard_performance_rate AS equipmentStandardPerformanceRate, equipment_baseline_error_rate AS equipmentBaselineErrorRate, equipment_eta_maint AS equipmentEtaMaint, equipment_idx AS equipmentIdx, current_equipment_grade AS currentEquipmentGrade, equipment_baseline_calculated_at AS equipmentBaselineCalculatedAt FROM equipment_baseline WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND equipment_baseline_calculated_at <= #{referenceTime} ORDER BY equipment_baseline_calculated_at DESC, equipment_baseline_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT equipment_baseline_id AS equipmentBaselineId, equipment_id AS equipmentId, equipment_aging_param_id AS equipmentAgingParamId, equipment_standard_performance_rate AS equipmentStandardPerformanceRate, equipment_baseline_error_rate AS equipmentBaselineErrorRate, equipment_eta_maint AS equipmentEtaMaint, equipment_idx AS equipmentIdx, current_equipment_grade AS currentEquipmentGrade, equipment_baseline_calculated_at AS equipmentBaselineCalculatedAt FROM equipment_baseline WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND equipment_baseline_calculated_at >= #{referenceTime} ORDER BY equipment_baseline_calculated_at ASC, equipment_baseline_id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT equipment_baseline_id AS equipmentBaselineId, equipment_id AS equipmentId, equipment_aging_param_id AS equipmentAgingParamId, equipment_standard_performance_rate AS equipmentStandardPerformanceRate, equipment_baseline_error_rate AS equipmentBaselineErrorRate, equipment_eta_maint AS equipmentEtaMaint, equipment_idx AS equipmentIdx, current_equipment_grade AS currentEquipmentGrade, equipment_baseline_calculated_at AS equipmentBaselineCalculatedAt FROM equipment_baseline WHERE equipment_baseline_calculated_at IS NULL OR equipment_eta_maint IS NULL OR equipment_idx IS NULL ORDER BY equipment_baseline_id DESC
